introSection: Kozmo's Kurves is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Knoebels Amusement Resort in Elysburg, Pennsylvania, USA. It is a custom-designed E&F Miler Industries roller coaster built on the former location of the High Speed Thrill Coaster. Kozmo's Kurves opened on August 1, 2009.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.

sections.title: Images
sections.content: The following photographs were taken during the construction of Kozmo's Kurves.

fullText:
Kozmo's Kurves is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Knoebels Amusement Resort in Elysburg, Pennsylvania, USA. It is a custom-designed E&F Miler Industries roller coaster built on the former location of the High Speed Thrill Coaster. Kozmo's Kurves opened on August 1, 2009.



Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders.

The following photographs were taken during the construction of Kozmo's Kurves.
